description: On a newly built aircraft, engineers must test the entire fuel system, including pumps, valves, and gauges.

nodes.task_description: Fill the aircraft's fuel tanks to various levels.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent oversees the fueling of the aircraft.

nodes.task_description: Operate the fuel pumps and valves to simulate transferring fuel between different tanks.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent runs a test script and confirms fuel transfers correctly.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the fuel quantity gauges in the cockpit provide accurate readings for each tank.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent compares the gauge readings to the known fuel quantity and confirms they are accurate within tolerance.
